creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Try actually running something OpenGL *under* ctwm e.g., if emacs no longer prints zink warning it'd be a new finding. The point is to check if X11 compositor sabotages regular X11 clients. For example, kwin_x11 (Plasma) or mutter (GNOME) do too much and are known sources of Xorg-specific bugs like bug 251836 or bug 253746.
